changes: flatShading:true added to ALL MeshStandardMaterial instances — key low-poly fix
Ocean: replaced ShaderMaterial with MeshStandardMaterial(flatShading:true) on PlaneGeometry(80,60,30,20). Per-frame vertex Y displacement creates animated wave facets
Cliff: BoxGeometry masses with displaceVertices() helper — random vertex jitter creates angular rock faces. 3 material tones: base(#3a3830), shadow(#2a2820), highlight(#4a4838)
Tower: replaced BoxGeometry with CylinderGeometry(r,r,h,7) — 7 radial segments = clearly low-poly. 4 stacked sections. Conical roof CylinderGeometry(0,1.8,3.5,7). Sandy grey #8a8068
Battlements: 7 BoxGeometry notch meshes placed around top ring at correct angles
Clouds: 8 flat BoxGeometry planes (w>>d) placed horizontally at different depths/heights. Colors #3a4050–#606878. flatShading makes polygon faces visible
Sky: BoxGeometry(400,200,400) BackSide + MeshStandardMaterial(flatShading:true, #1a2030) replaces ShaderMaterial sphere
Vegetation: 18 ConeGeometry(r,h,4) bushes — 4 segments = diamond shape. Colors #1a3020 / #243818. Scattered on right cliff side
Path: PlaneGeometry sandy ribbon (#b0a080, flatShading:true) winding up cliff right side
Foam patches: 6 CircleGeometry(r,5) near cliff base, semi-transparent white (#ddeeff)
Camera: moved from (0,12,35)→(-8,18,28), lookAt from (0,5,-20)→(4,2,-10). High angle, right-of-center tower framing
Lighting: removed PointLight on cliff, kept DirectionalLight(-20,30,10)+AmbientLight(0x202030,0.4). Tower interior PointLight(0xffaa44) kept
Renderer: antialias:false to preserve sharp polygon edges. NoToneMapping to keep flat colors accurate
SeaSpraySystem preserved — 120 particles, repositioned to cliff base area
God ray sprite removed — does not fit low-poly aesthetic
All interfaces, dispose pattern, resize handler, startDolly no-op preserved
